caption: The video begins with a white screen displaying the "PoemCity MONTPELIER | 2019" logo, followed by the text "Native Music and Poetry," the names "Roland Bluto and Bryan Blanchette," and the date "April 12, 2019." This title card remains static for a short period. The scene then transitions to a white slide featuring logos for the "National Life Group Foundation," "Vermont Humanities Because Ideas Matter," "Hunger Mountain COOP," and "Vermont College of Fine Arts." Simultaneously, the video cuts to a live scene where a woman with short grey hair, wearing a light green cardigan, is speaking and gesturing with her hands while holding a dark book. Beside her stands a man with long dark hair tied back, wearing a white shirt and a dark vest. They are positioned in front of a brown paneled wall, with the backs of several audience members visible in the foreground.
